source.conversation_context: Operator corrected agent tool-selection preference after observing native shell overuse.

title: Prefer MCP-specific tools before MCP shell before native shell

content.principle: When executing Narada work, prefer MCP-exposed specific commands first, MCP-governed shell second, and native shell only when neither is available or the Operator explicitly requests native shell.
content.rationale: Narada authority boundaries are better preserved when agents use typed MCP affordances and governed execution surfaces instead of defaulting to ambient native shell access.
content.contract_patch: Add Tool Preference Hierarchy to root AGENTS.md.
not_applicable_when: The Operator explicitly requests native shell
No MCP-specific command exists for the operation and no MCP-governed shell surface is available
The action is a non-authority-affecting local inspection and MCP surfaces are unavailable
